channel.title: Mathematics on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Mathematics on Alien Truth Social

item.title: UFO (2018 film)
item.description:
UFO (2018) is a science fiction film written and directed by Ryan Eslinger that follows a mathematics student, played by Alex Sharp, as he attempts to prove the reality of extraterrestrial encounters. Assisted by a professor portrayed by Gillian Anderson, the protagonist decodes complex signals to challenge official government cover-ups regarding a UAP sighting. The film offers a grounded, math-centric take on the UFO genre, though critical reception suggests it serves primarily as a modest nod to classic alien-encounter cinema. Sony Pictures released the project directly to video on September 4, 2018.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UFO_%282018_film%29

item.title: UFO
item.description:
The 2018 American science fiction film UFO stars Gillian Anderson and Alex Sharp. It follows a mathematics student who attempts to prove the existence of extraterrestrials after a UFO sighting causes electromagnetic interference. With the help of his professor, he deciphers a message containing the fine-structure constant and coordinates. The film was released directly to video on September 4, 2018.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UFO_%282018_film%29
